creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Felder from comment #0)

Hi, Mark!

The idea looks good to me, there is a lot of development happens now in vfs_fruit module..

Few questions - I see that the given patch is 1 of 2. So what and where is the 2/2?

I see some changes in the Makefile you made, which I don't see the reason for.

Like UTMP option became TMP, removed EXTRA_PATCHES section... Are those typos or random acts of cleanups :)?
